  children={"Openai Retrieve File"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/files/{file_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve file.

Returns information about a specific file.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"file_id","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":"Path parameter: file_id"}]}
>

</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>

</RequestSchema>
